title: Keep Your Pet Warm
description: Provide warm bedding and consider pet-safe sweaters or coats, especially for short-haired breeds.

title: Protect Their Paws
description: Use paw balm or pet boots to protect against ice, salt, and cold surfaces during walks.

title: Maintain Proper Nutrition
description: Ensure your pet has a balanced diet to maintain energy levels and body heat during colder months.

title: Limit Outdoor Time
description: Avoid prolonged exposure to freezing temperatures; keep walks short and monitor for signs of discomfort.

title: Keep Them Hydrated
description: Pets still need plenty of fresh water in winter; ensure their water doesn’t freeze.

title: Regular Grooming
description: Maintain a clean coat and trimmed fur to prevent matting, which can reduce insulation.
